04362: function roleDeclarationEmployees(kind){
04363:   const active = e=>e.act!==false;
04364:   const role = e=>String(e.role||'');
04365:   if(kind==='clear') return D.emp.slice();
04366:   if(kind==='acct') return D.emp.filter(e=>active(e)&&/(محاسب|صندوق)/.test(role(e)));
04367:   if(kind==='plant') return D.emp.filter(e=>active(e)&&/(مشرف.*محطة|محطة.*خلط)/.test(role(e)));
04368:   if(kind==='mech') return D.emp.filter(e=>active(e)&&/(ميكانيكي|فني.*ورشة)/.test(role(e)));
04369:   return [];
04370: }

04372: function refreshRoleEmployeeOptions(){
04373:   const kind=$('prKind')?.value||'acct', select=$('prEmp');
04374:   if(!select) return;
04375:   const current=select.value, list=roleDeclarationEmployees(kind);
04376:   select.innerHTML = list.length
04377:     ? '<option value="">— اختر الموظف —</option>'+list.map(e=>`<option value="${e.id}">${esc(e.name)} — ${esc(e.role)}</option>`).join('')
04378:     : '<option value="">— لا يوجد موظف مطابق —</option>';
04379:   if(list.some(e=>e.id===current)) select.value=current;
04380: }

06856: <script id="binhamid-control-v2-script">
06857: (function(){
06858: 'use strict';
06859: const BH_VERSION='2026.07.14-control-v4';
06860: const bhOriginalDocVeh=window.docVeh;
06861: window.__bhOriginalInspect=window.docVehInspect;
06862: const bhOriginalOpsDieselControlData=window.opsDieselControlData;
06863: const bhOriginalOpsAlerts=window.opsAlerts;

06865: function bhNum(v){const n=Number(v||0);return Number.isFinite(n)?n:0;}
06866: function bhDate(v){return String(v||'').slice(0,10);}
06867: function bhAddDays(date,days){if(!date)return '';const d=new Date(date+'T12:00:00');if(Number.isNaN(d.getTime()))return '';d.setDate(d.getDate()+Number(days||0));return d.toISOString().slice(0,10);}
06868: function bhDaysLate(date){if(!date)return 0;const a=new Date(date+'T00:00:00'),b=new Date((typeof opsToday==='function'?opsToday():today())+'T00:00:00');return Math.max(0,Math.floor((b-a)/86400000));}
06869: function bhKind(d){return typeof opsSalesKind==='function'?opsSalesKind(d):(/خرسان/.test(String(d?.product||''))?'concrete':/بل[وؤ]ك/.test(String(d?.product||''))?'block':'');}
06870: function bhKindLabel(kind){return kind==='concrete'?'خرسانة':kind==='block'?'بلوك':'أخرى';}
06871: function bhSafeOps(){return typeof OPS!=='undefined'&&OPS?OPS:{deliveries:[],collections:[],maintenance:[],fuel:[],trips:[],items:[],custodies:[]};}
06872: function bhPaymentDays(client){return Math.max(0,Number(client?.days??D.cfg.days??3));}
06873: 
06874: /* Invoice-to-collection reconciliation. Immediate cash/transfer is attached to the sale;
06875:    later collection receipts are allocated FIFO to the oldest outstanding invoices. */
06876: function bhClientLedger(clientId,requestedKind){
06877:   const S=bhSafeOps(),client=(D.cli||[]).find(c=>c.id===clientId)||{};
06878:   const invoices=(S.deliveries||[]).filter(d=>d.clientId===clientId&&d.status!=='returned').map(d=>({id:d.id,no:d.clientOrder||d.no||'',date:bhDate(d.date),kind:bhKind(d),product:d.product||'',quantity:bhNum(d.quantity),unit:d.unit||'',amount:bhNum(d.amount),immediatePaid:0,allocatedCollection:0,remaining:bhNum(d.amount),dueDate:bhAddDays(bhDate(d.date),bhPaymentDays(client)),source:d})).sort((a,b)=>a.date.localeCompare(b.date)||String(a.no).localeCompare(String(b.no)));
06879:   const byId=new Map(invoices.map(x=>[x.id,x])),collections=(S.collections||[]).filter(c=>c.clientId===clientId).slice().sort((a,b)=>bhDate(a.date).localeCompare(bhDate(b.date))||String(a.no||'').localeCompare(String(b.no||'')));
06880:   let unapplied=0;
06881:   const allocateTo=(inv,left)=>{if(!inv||left<=0||inv.remaining<=0)return left;const x=Math.min(left,inv.remaining);inv.allocatedCollection+=x;inv.remaining-=x;return left-x;};
06882:   collections.forEach(c=>{
06883:     let left=Math.max(0,bhNum(c.amount));
06884:     if(c.invoiceId)left=allocateTo(byId.get(c.invoiceId),left);
06885:     if(left>0&&c.allocationMode!=='invoice_only'){
06886:       const payDate=bhDate(c.date);
06887:       for(const inv of invoices){if(left<=0)break;if(!payDate||inv.date<=payDate)left=allocateTo(inv,left);}
06888:       /* Any excess is a valid advance payment. Re-evaluating the ledger after future
06889:          invoices are imported automatically consumes that credit FIFO. */
06890:       for(const inv of invoices){if(left<=0)break;left=allocateTo(inv,left);}
06891:     }
06892:     if(left>0)unapplied+=left;
06893:   });
06894:   const selected=invoices.filter(x=>!requestedKind||x.kind===requestedKind),aggregate=selected.reduce((o,x)=>{o.quantity+=x.quantity;o.sales+=x.amount;o.collections+=x.allocatedCollection;o.paid+=x.allocatedCollection;o.grossRemaining+=x.remaining;if(x.remaining>0&&x.dueDate&&x.dueDate<(typeof opsToday==='function'?opsToday():today()))o.overdue+=x.remaining;return o;},{quantity:0,sales:0,immediate:0,collections:0,paid:0,grossRemaining:0,overdue:0});
06895:   const totalPayments=collections.reduce((s,c)=>s+Math.max(0,bhNum(c.amount)),0),credit=requestedKind?0:unapplied,netBalance=aggregate.grossRemaining-credit,debitBalance=Math.max(0,netBalance),creditBalance=Math.max(0,-netBalance),openSelected=selected.filter(x=>x.remaining>0).sort((a,b)=>a.dueDate.localeCompare(b.dueDate));
06896:   return {client,invoices,selected,...aggregate,paid:requestedKind?aggregate.paid:totalPayments,remaining:debitBalance,debitBalance,creditBalance,netBalance,unapplied:credit,nextDueDate:openSelected[0]?.dueDate||'',maxDaysLate:openSelected.reduce((m,x)=>Math.max(m,bhDaysLate(x.dueDate)),0)};
06897: }
06898: window.bhClientLedger=bhClientLedger;
06899: window.bhClientAggregate=bhClientAggregate;
06900: 
06901: function bhClientAggregate(c,kind){return bhClientLedger(c.id,kind);}
06902: function bhClientQtyText(c){const a=bhClientAggregate(c,'concrete'),b=bhClientAggregate(c,'block'),parts=[];if(a.quantity)parts.push(`${opsNum(a.quantity)} م³ خرسانة`);if(b.quantity)parts.push(`${opsNum(b.quantity)} بلوك`);return parts.join(' · ')||'لا توجد حركة';}
06903: function bhAllReceivables(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bhClientAggregate(c).remaining,0);}
06904: function bhAllOverdue(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bhClientAggregate(c).overdue,0);}

04733: /* --- QR (qrcode-generator, MIT) --- */
04734: function qrSVG(text, px){
04735:   try{
04736:     const q = qrcode(0, 'M');
04737:     q.addData(text, 'Byte');
04738:     q.make();
04739:     const n = q.getModuleCount();
04740:     const pad = 2, tot = n + pad*2, s = px/tot;

04660:     'المتأخر':           window.bhClientLedger ? Number(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).overdue||0) : 0,

04662:     'المندوب المسؤول':   nm(c.rep) || '⚠ غير مُسند',

04668:   /* ---- 5. ملخص ---- */
04669:   const SS = () => {
04670:     const drv  = D.emp.filter(e=>e.role.includes('سائق')||e.role.includes('مشغّل'));
04671:     const rep  = D.emp.filter(e=>e.role.includes('مندوب')||e.role.includes('مسؤول مبيعات'));
04672:     const noDr = D.veh.filter(v=>!v.drv);
04673:     const noRp = D.cli.filter(c=>!c.rep);
04674:     const val  = D.veh.reduce((s,v)=>s+Number(v.val||0),0);
04675:     const receivable = D.cli.reduce((s,c)=>s+(window.bhClientLedger?Number(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).remaining||0):0),0);
04676:     const overdue = D.cli.reduce((s,c)=>s+(window.bhClientLedger?Number(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).overdue||0):0),0);
04677:     const byG  = {};
04678:     D.veh.forEach(v=>{ const g=v.grp||'بدون مجموعة'; byG[g]=(byG[g]||0)+1; });
04679: 
04680:     const rows = [
04681:       {'البند':'إجمالي المركبات والمعدات', 'القيمة':D.veh.length},
04682:       {'البند':'إجمالي قيمة الأصول (ر.س)', 'القيمة':val},
04683:       {'البند':'مركبات بدون سائق مُسند',   'القيمة':noDr.length},
04684:       {'البند':'', 'القيمة':''},
04685:       {'البند':'إجمالي الموظفين',          'القيمة':D.emp.length},
04686:       {'البند':'السائقون والمشغّلون',      'القيمة':drv.length},
04687:       {'البند':'مندوبو المبيعات',          'القيمة':rep.length},
04688:       {'البند':'', 'القيمة':''},
04689:       {'البند':'إجمالي العملاء',           'القيمة':D.cli.length},
04690:       {'البند':'إجمالي أرصدة العملاء (ر.س)','القيمة':receivable},
04691:       {'البند':'إجمالي المتأخر عن السداد (ر.س)','القيمة':overdue},
04692:       {'البند':'عملاء بدون مندوب مُسند',   'القيمة':noRp.length},
04693:       {'البند':'', 'القيمة':''}
04694:     ];
04695:     Object.keys(byG).sort().forEach(g=>rows.push({'البند':'مجموعة: '+g, 'القيمة':byG[g]}));
04696:     rows.push({'البند':'', 'القيمة':''});
04697:     rows.push({'البند':'تاريخ التصدير', 'القيمة':fmtG(today())});
04698:     rows.push({'البند':'المنشأة',       'القيمة':D.cfg.name});
04699:     return rows;
04700:   };

04705:   }

04721: function curLang(){ return ($('pvLang') && $('pvLang').value) || 'ar'; }
04722: function vehSet(v, emp, L, wantIns, wantLog){
04723:   const H = [docVeh(v, emp, L)];
04724:   if(wantIns){ H.push(docVehInspect(v, emp, L)); }
04725:   if(wantLog){ H.push(docVehLog(v, emp, L)); }
04726:   return H.join('');

04733: /* --- QR (qrcode-generator, MIT) --- */
04734: function qrSVG(text, px){
04735:   try{
04736:     const q = qrcode(0, 'M');
04737:     q.addData(text, 'Byte');
04738:     q.make();
04739:     const n = q.getModuleCount();
04740:     const pad = 2, tot = n + pad*2, s = px/tot;
04741:     let r = `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 ${px} ${px}" width="${px}" height="${px}" shape-rendering="crispEdges"><rect width="${px}" height="${px}" fill="#fff"/>`;
04742:     for(let y=0;y<n;y++) for(let x=0;x<n;x++) if(q.isDark(y,x))
04743:       r += `<rect x="${((x+pad)*s).toFixed(2)}" y="${((y+pad)*s).toFixed(2)}" width="${(s+0.35).toFixed(2)}" height="${(s+0.35).toFixed(2)}" fill="#0B2233"/>`;
04744:     return r+'</svg>';
04745:   }catch(e){ console.warn('qr',e); return ''; }
04746: }

04733: /* --- QR (qrcode-generator, MIT) --- */
04734: function qrSVG(text, px){
04735:   try{
04736:     const q = qrcode(0, 'M');
04737:     q.addData(text, 'Byte');
04738:     q.make();
04739:     const n = q.getModuleCount();
04740:     const pad = 2, tot = n + pad*2, s = px/tot;
04741:     let r = `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 ${px} ${px}" width="${px}" height="${px}" shape-rendering="crispEdges"><rect width="${px}" height="${px}" fill="#fff"/>`;
04742:     for(let y=0;y<n;y++) for(let x=0;x<n;x++) if(q.isDark(y,x))
04743:       r += `<rect x="${((x+pad)*s).toFixed(2)}" y="${((y+pad)*s).toFixed(2)}" width="${(s+0.35).toFixed(2)}" height="${(s+0.35).toFixed(2)}" fill="#0B2233"/>`;
04744:     return r+'</svg>';
04745:   }catch(e){ console.warn('qr',e); return ''; }
04746: }

04762:   if(c.vat)  ids.push(`<div><i>الرقم الضريبي</i><b>${esc(c.vat)}</b></div>`);
04763:   if(c.ind)  ids.push(`<div><i>الترخيص الصناعي</i><b>${esc(c.ind)}</b></div>`);
04764:   if(c.addr) ids.push(`<div class="full"><i>العنوان الوطني</i><b style="font-family:inherit;font-size:7.3pt">${esc(c.addr)}</b></div>`);
04765:   const cn = [c.tel, c.mail].filter(Boolean).join('  ·  ');
===== ANCHOR window.bhClientLedger / LINES 6873-6987 =====
06873: 
06874: /* Invoice-to-collection reconciliation. Immediate cash/transfer is attached to the sale;
06875:    later collection receipts are allocated FIFO to the oldest outstanding invoices. */
06876: function bhClientLedger(clientId,requestedKind){
06877:   const S=bhSafeOps(),client=(D.cli||[]).find(c=>c.id===clientId)||{};
06878:   const invoices=(S.deliveries||[]).filter(d=>d.clientId===clientId&&d.status!=='returned').map(d=>({id:d.id,no:d.clientOrder||d.no||'',date:bhDate(d.date),kind:bhKind(d),product:d.product||'',quantity:bhNum(d.quantity),unit:d.unit||'',amount:bhNum(d.amount),immediatePaid:0,allocatedCollection:0,remaining:bhNum(d.amount),dueDate:bhAddDays(bhDate(d.date),bhPaymentDays(client)),source:d})).sort((a,b)=>a.date.localeCompare(b.date)||String(a.no).localeCompare(String(b.no)));
06879:   const byId=new Map(invoices.map(x=>[x.id,x])),collections=(S.collections||[]).filter(c=>c.clientId===clientId).slice().sort((a,b)=>bhDate(a.date).localeCompare(bhDate(b.date))||String(a.no||'').localeCompare(String(b.no||'')));
06880:   let unapplied=0;
06881:   const allocateTo=(inv,left)=>{if(!inv||left<=0||inv.remaining<=0)return left;const x=Math.min(left,inv.remaining);inv.allocatedCollection+=x;inv.remaining-=x;return left-x;};
06882:   collections.forEach(c=>{
06883:     let left=Math.max(0,bhNum(c.amount));
06884:     if(c.invoiceId)left=allocateTo(byId.get(c.invoiceId),left);
06885:     if(left>0&&c.allocationMode!=='invoice_only'){
06886:       const payDate=bhDate(c.date);
06887:       for(const inv of invoices){if(left<=0)break;if(!payDate||inv.date<=payDate)left=allocateTo(inv,left);}
06888:       /* Any excess is a valid advance payment. Re-evaluating the ledger after future
06889:          invoices are imported automatically consumes that credit FIFO. */
06890:       for(const inv of invoices){if(left<=0)break;left=allocateTo(inv,left);}
06891:     }
06892:     if(left>0)unapplied+=left;
06893:   });
06894:   const selected=invoices.filter(x=>!requestedKind||x.kind===requestedKind),aggregate=selected.reduce((o,x)=>{o.quantity+=x.quantity;o.sales+=x.amount;o.collections+=x.allocatedCollection;o.paid+=x.allocatedCollection;o.grossRemaining+=x.remaining;if(x.remaining>0&&x.dueDate&&x.dueDate<(typeof opsToday==='function'?opsToday():today()))o.overdue+=x.remaining;return o;},{quantity:0,sales:0,immediate:0,collections:0,paid:0,grossRemaining:0,overdue:0});
06895:   const totalPayments=collections.reduce((s,c)=>s+Math.max(0,bhNum(c.amount)),0),credit=requestedKind?0:unapplied,netBalance=aggregate.grossRemaining-credit,debitBalance=Math.max(0,netBalance),creditBalance=Math.max(0,-netBalance),openSelected=selected.filter(x=>x.remaining>0).sort((a,b)=>a.dueDate.localeCompare(b.dueDate));
06896:   return {client,invoices,selected,...aggregate,paid:requestedKind?aggregate.paid:totalPayments,remaining:debitBalance,debitBalance,creditBalance,netBalance,unapplied:credit,nextDueDate:openSelected[0]?.dueDate||'',maxDaysLate:openSelected.reduce((m,x)=>Math.max(m,bhDaysLate(x.dueDate)),0)};
06897: }

06902: function bhClientQtyText(c){const a=bhClientAggregate(c,'concrete'),b=bhClientAggregate(c,'block'),parts=[];if(a.quantity)parts.push(`${opsNum(a.quantity)} م³ خرسانة`);if(b.quantity)parts.push(`${opsNum(b.quantity)} بلوك`);return parts.join(' · ')||'لا توجد حركة';}
06903: function bhAllReceivables(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bhClientAggregate(c).remaining,0);}
06904: function bhAllOverdue(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bhClientAggregate(c).overdue,0);}

07151: function bh4N(v){const n=Number(v||0);return Number.isFinite(n)?n:0;}
07152: function bh4StatusLabel(v){return (BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.find(x=>x[0]===String(v?.operationalStatus||''))||BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES[0])[1];}

07154: function bh4DieselExpected(v){const m=String(v?.dieselExpected||'auto');if(m==='yes')return true;if(m==='no')return false;if(v?.operationalStatus==='in_service')return true;if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v?.operationalStatus))return false;return null;}

07156: function bh4NormName(v){return String(v||'').normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u064B-\u065F\u0670]/g,'').replace(/[أإآ]/g,'ا').replace(/ى/g,'ي').replace(/ة/g,'ه').replace(/[^\p{L}\p{N}]+/gu,'').toLowerCase();}

07158: function bh4CustomerBalanceText(l){if(l.creditBalance>0)return `رصيد دائن ${opsMoney(l.creditBalance)} ر.س`;if(l.remaining>0)return `رصيد مدين ${opsMoney(l.remaining)} ر.س`;return 'الرصيد مسدد';}

07167:     const fuel=byVehicle.get(v.id)||[],drivers=[...new Set(fuel.map(opsFuelDisplayDriver).filter(x=>x&&x!=='—'))],assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',assignedNorm=bh4NormName(assigned),driverMatched=!assigned||!drivers.length?null:drivers.some(x=>bh4NormName(x)===assignedNorm),openMaint=(OPS.maintenance||[]).find(m=>m.entityKind==='vehicle'&&m.entityId===v.id&&['pending_approval','approved','open','completed'].includes(m.status)),expected=bh4DieselExpected(v);

07111: window.rCli=function(){const s=$('fSeg').value,r=$('fRep').value,t=$('tCli');let L=D.cli;if(s)L=L.filter(c=>c.seg===s);if(r)L=L.filter(c=>c.rep===r);if(!L.length){t.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="9"><div class="empty"><span class="big">🧾</span>لا يوجد عملاء</div></td></tr>`;return;}t.innerHTML=L.map(c=>{const rp=D.emp.find(e=>e.id===c.rep),a=window.bhClientAggregate(c),due=a.nextDueDate?fmtG(a.nextDueDate):'—';return `<tr><td><b>${esc(c.name)}</b><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">${esc(c.code?'رقم العميل: '+c.code:(c.cr||''))}</div></td><td><span class="chip ${c.seg==='بلوك'?'blk':'con'}">${esc(c.seg)}</span></td><td>${typeof bhClientQtyText==='function'?bhClientQtyText(c):'—'}</td><td class="mono">${money(a.sales)}</td><td class="mono">${money(a.paid)}</td><td class="mono ${a.remaining?'client-balance-positive':'client-balance-clear'}">${money(a.remaining)}</td><td>${due}${a.maxDaysLate?`<div style="color:var(--warn);font-size:11px">متأخر ${a.maxDaysLate} يوم</div>`:''}</td><td>${rp?esc(rp.name):'<span style="color:var(--warn)">غير مُسند</span>'}</td><td><button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="cliForm('${c.id}')">تعديل</button></td></tr>`;}).join('');};

07144: (function(){
07145: 'use strict';
07146: const BH4_VERSION='2026.07.14-control-v4-fleet-reconciliation-customer-credit';
07147: const BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES=[
07148:   ['', 'غير محدد'],['in_service','في الخدمة'],['parked','مركون / احتياطي'],['stopped','متوقف'],['maintenance','في الصيانة'],['out_of_service','خارج الخدمة'],['sold','مباع / مستبعد']
07149: ];
07150: const BH4_DIESEL_EXPECT=[['auto','حسب الحالة التشغيلية'],['yes','متوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل'],['no','لا يُتوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل']];
07151: function bh4N(v){const n=Number(v||0);return Number.isFinite(n)?n:0;}
07152: function bh4StatusLabel(v){return (BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.find(x=>x[0]===String(v?.operationalStatus||''))||BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES[0])[1];}
07153: function bh4StatusClass(v){return ({in_service:'active',parked:'parked',maintenance:'maintenance',stopped:'stopped',out_of_service:'out',sold:'out'})[v?.operationalStatus]||'';}
07154: function bh4DieselExpected(v){const m=String(v?.dieselExpected||'auto');if(m==='yes')return true;if(m==='no')return false;if(v?.operationalStatus==='in_service')return true;if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v?.operationalStatus))return false;return null;}
07155: function bh4StatusChip(v){return `<span class="bh4-status ${bh4StatusClass(v)}">${opsEsc(bh4StatusLabel(v))}</span>`;}
07156: function bh4NormName(v){return String(v||'').normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u064B-\u065F\u0670]/g,'').replace(/[أإآ]/g,'ا').replace(/ى/g,'ي').replace(/ة/g,'ه').replace(/[^\p{L}\p{N}]+/gu,'').toLowerCase();}
07157: function bh4DateOverlap(a1,a2,b1,b2){return (!a2||!b1||a2>=b1)&&(!b2||!a1||b2>=a1);}
07158: function bh4CustomerBalanceText(l){if(l.creditBalance>0)return `رصيد دائن ${opsMoney(l.creditBalance)} ر.س`;if(l.remaining>0)return `رصيد مدين ${opsMoney(l.remaining)} ر.س`;return 'الرصيد مسدد';}
07159: function bh4AllCredits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).creditBalance),0);}
07160: function bh4AllDebits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).remaining),0);}
07161: window.bh4AllCredits=bh4AllCredits;

07163: function bh4Reconciliation(from,to,vehicleId){
07164:   const rows=opsDieselRows(from,to,vehicleId||''),byVehicle=new Map();
07165:   rows.forEach(f=>{if(!f.vehicleId)return;if(!byVehicle.has(f.vehicleId))byVehicle.set(f.vehicleId,[]);byVehicle.get(f.vehicleId).push(f);});
07166:   const assets=(D.veh||[]).filter(v=>!vehicleId||v.id===vehicleId).map(v=>{
07167:     const fuel=byVehicle.get(v.id)||[],drivers=[...new Set(fuel.map(opsFuelDisplayDriver).filter(x=>x&&x!=='—'))],assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',assignedNorm=bh4NormName(assigned),driverMatched=!assigned||!drivers.length?null:drivers.some(x=>bh4NormName(x)===assignedNorm),openMaint=(OPS.maintenance||[]).find(m=>m.entityKind==='vehicle'&&m.entityId===v.id&&['pending_approval','approved','open','completed'].includes(m.status)),expected=bh4DieselExpected(v);
07168:     let effectiveStatus=bh4StatusLabel(v);if(!v.operationalStatus&&openMaint)effectiveStatus='في الصيانة';
07169:     const appeared=fuel.length>0,needsClass=!appeared&&expected===null,missingExpected=!appeared&&expected===true,conflict=appeared&&['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||'');
07170:     let review='مطابق';if(conflict)review='ظهر ديزل رغم أن الحالة غير تشغيلية';else if(missingExpected)review='متوقع في الخدمة ولم يظهر';else if(needsClass)review='حدد الحالة التشغيلية';else if(driverMatched===false)review='السائق في التقرير مختلف';else if(!appeared)review='لا توجد تعبئة في الفترة';
07171:     return {vehicle:v,fuel,appeared,fills:fuel.length,liters:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.liters),0),amount:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.cost),0),drivers,assigned,effectiveStatus,expected,needsClass,missingExpected,conflict,driverMatched,review};
07172:   });
07173:   const imports=(OPS.fuelImports||[]).filter(x=>bh4DateOverlap(x.from,x.to,from,to)),unmatched=[...new Set(imports.flatMap(x=>x.unmatchedPlates||[]))];
07174:   return {assets,rows,unmatched,total:assets.length,appeared:assets.filter(x=>x.appeared).length,notAppeared:assets.filter(x=>!x.appeared).length,needsClass:assets.filter(x=>x.needsClass).length,missingExpected:assets.filter(x=>x.missingExpected).length,conflicts:assets.filter(x=>x.conflict||x.driverMatched===false).length};
07175: }

07146: const BH4_VERSION='2026.07.14-control-v4-fleet-reconciliation-customer-credit';
07147: const BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES=[
07148:   ['', 'غير محدد'],['in_service','في الخدمة'],['parked','مركون / احتياطي'],['stopped','متوقف'],['maintenance','في الصيانة'],['out_of_service','خارج الخدمة'],['sold','مباع / مستبعد']
07149: ];
07150: const BH4_DIESEL_EXPECT=[['auto','حسب الحالة التشغيلية'],['yes','متوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل'],['no','لا يُتوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل']];
07151: function bh4N(v){const n=Number(v||0);return Number.isFinite(n)?n:0;}
07152: function bh4StatusLabel(v){return (BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.find(x=>x[0]===String(v?.operationalStatus||''))||BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES[0])[1];}
07153: function bh4StatusClass(v){return ({in_service:'active',parked:'parked',maintenance:'maintenance',stopped:'stopped',out_of_service:'out',sold:'out'})[v?.operationalStatus]||'';}
07154: function bh4DieselExpected(v){const m=String(v?.dieselExpected||'auto');if(m==='yes')return true;if(m==='no')return false;if(v?.operationalStatus==='in_service')return true;if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v?.operationalStatus))return false;return null;}
07155: function bh4StatusChip(v){return `<span class="bh4-status ${bh4StatusClass(v)}">${opsEsc(bh4StatusLabel(v))}</span>`;}
07156: function bh4NormName(v){return String(v||'').normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u064B-\u065F\u0670]/g,'').replace(/[أإآ]/g,'ا').replace(/ى/g,'ي').replace(/ة/g,'ه').replace(/[^\p{L}\p{N}]+/gu,'').toLowerCase();}
07157: function bh4DateOverlap(a1,a2,b1,b2){return (!a2||!b1||a2>=b1)&&(!b2||!a1||b2>=a1);}
07158: function bh4CustomerBalanceText(l){if(l.creditBalance>0)return `رصيد دائن ${opsMoney(l.creditBalance)} ر.س`;if(l.remaining>0)return `رصيد مدين ${opsMoney(l.remaining)} ر.س`;return 'الرصيد مسدد';}
07159: function bh4AllCredits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).creditBalance),0);}
07160: function bh4AllDebits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).remaining),0);}

07163: function bh4Reconciliation(from,to,vehicleId){
07164:   const rows=opsDieselRows(from,to,vehicleId||''),byVehicle=new Map();
07165:   rows.forEach(f=>{if(!f.vehicleId)return;if(!byVehicle.has(f.vehicleId))byVehicle.set(f.vehicleId,[]);byVehicle.get(f.vehicleId).push(f);});
07166:   const assets=(D.veh||[]).filter(v=>!vehicleId||v.id===vehicleId).map(v=>{
07167:     const fuel=byVehicle.get(v.id)||[],drivers=[...new Set(fuel.map(opsFuelDisplayDriver).filter(x=>x&&x!=='—'))],assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',assignedNorm=bh4NormName(assigned),driverMatched=!assigned||!drivers.length?null:drivers.some(x=>bh4NormName(x)===assignedNorm),openMaint=(OPS.maintenance||[]).find(m=>m.entityKind==='vehicle'&&m.entityId===v.id&&['pending_approval','approved','open','completed'].includes(m.status)),expected=bh4DieselExpected(v);
07168:     let effectiveStatus=bh4StatusLabel(v);if(!v.operationalStatus&&openMaint)effectiveStatus='في الصيانة';
07169:     const appeared=fuel.length>0,needsClass=!appeared&&expected===null,missingExpected=!appeared&&expected===true,conflict=appeared&&['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||'');
07170:     let review='مطابق';if(conflict)review='ظهر ديزل رغم أن الحالة غير تشغيلية';else if(missingExpected)review='متوقع في الخدمة ولم يظهر';else if(needsClass)review='حدد الحالة التشغيلية';else if(driverMatched===false)review='السائق في التقرير مختلف';else if(!appeared)review='لا توجد تعبئة في الفترة';
07171:     return {vehicle:v,fuel,appeared,fills:fuel.length,liters:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.liters),0),amount:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.cost),0),drivers,assigned,effectiveStatus,expected,needsClass,missingExpected,conflict,driverMatched,review};
07172:   });
07173:   const imports=(OPS.fuelImports||[]).filter(x=>bh4DateOverlap(x.from,x.to,from,to)),unmatched=[...new Set(imports.flatMap(x=>x.unmatchedPlates||[]))];
07174:   return {assets,rows,unmatched,total:assets.length,appeared:assets.filter(x=>x.appeared).length,notAppeared:assets.filter(x=>!x.appeared).length,needsClass:assets.filter(x=>x.needsClass).length,missingExpected:assets.filter(x=>x.missingExpected).length,conflicts:assets.filter(x=>x.conflict||x.driverMatched===false).length};

07111: window.rCli=function(){const s=$('fSeg').value,r=$('fRep').value,t=$('tCli');let L=D.cli;if(s)L=L.filter(c=>c.seg===s);if(r)L=L.filter(c=>c.rep===r);if(!L.length){t.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="9"><div class="empty"><span class="big">🧾</span>لا يوجد عملاء</div></td></tr>`;return;}t.innerHTML=L.map(c=>{const rp=D.emp.find(e=>e.id===c.rep),a=window.bhClientAggregate(c),due=a.nextDueDate?fmtG(a.nextDueDate):'—';return `<tr><td><b>${esc(c.name)}</b><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">${esc(c.code?'رقم العميل: '+c.code:(c.cr||''))}</div></td><td><span class="chip ${c.seg==='بلوك'?'blk':'con'}">${esc(c.seg)}</span></td><td>${typeof bhClientQtyText==='function'?bhClientQtyText(c):'—'}</td><td class="mono">${money(a.sales)}</td><td class="mono">${money(a.paid)}</td><td class="mono ${a.remaining?'client-balance-positive':'client-balance-clear'}">${money(a.remaining)}</td><td>${due}${a.maxDaysLate?`<div style="color:var(--warn);font-size:11px">متأخر ${a.maxDaysLate} يوم</div>`:''}</td><td>${rp?esc(rp.name):'<span style="color:var(--warn)">غير مُسند</span>'}</td><td><button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="cliForm('${c.id}')">تعديل</button></td></tr>`;}).join('');};

07147: const BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES=[
07148:   ['', 'غير محدد'],['in_service','في الخدمة'],['parked','مركون / احتياطي'],['stopped','متوقف'],['maintenance','في الصيانة'],['out_of_service','خارج الخدمة'],['sold','مباع / مستبعد']
07149: ];
07150: const BH4_DIESEL_EXPECT=[['auto','حسب الحالة التشغيلية'],['yes','متوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل'],['no','لا يُتوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل']];
07151: function bh4N(v){const n=Number(v||0);return Number.isFinite(n)?n:0;}
07152: function bh4StatusLabel(v){return (BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.find(x=>x[0]===String(v?.operationalStatus||''))||BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES[0])[1];}
07153: function bh4StatusClass(v){return ({in_service:'active',parked:'parked',maintenance:'maintenance',stopped:'stopped',out_of_service:'out',sold:'out'})[v?.operationalStatus]||'';}
07154: function bh4DieselExpected(v){const m=String(v?.dieselExpected||'auto');if(m==='yes')return true;if(m==='no')return false;if(v?.operationalStatus==='in_service')return true;if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v?.operationalStatus))return false;return null;}
07155: function bh4StatusChip(v){return `<span class="bh4-status ${bh4StatusClass(v)}">${opsEsc(bh4StatusLabel(v))}</span>`;}
07156: function bh4NormName(v){return String(v||'').normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u064B-\u065F\u0670]/g,'').replace(/[أإآ]/g,'ا').replace(/ى/g,'ي').replace(/ة/g,'ه').replace(/[^\p{L}\p{N}]+/gu,'').toLowerCase();}
07157: function bh4DateOverlap(a1,a2,b1,b2){return (!a2||!b1||a2>=b1)&&(!b2||!a1||b2>=a1);}
07158: function bh4CustomerBalanceText(l){if(l.creditBalance>0)return `رصيد دائن ${opsMoney(l.creditBalance)} ر.س`;if(l.remaining>0)return `رصيد مدين ${opsMoney(l.remaining)} ر.س`;return 'الرصيد مسدد';}
07159: function bh4AllCredits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).creditBalance),0);}
07160: function bh4AllDebits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).remaining),0);}

07163: function bh4Reconciliation(from,to,vehicleId){
07164:   const rows=opsDieselRows(from,to,vehicleId||''),byVehicle=new Map();
07165:   rows.forEach(f=>{if(!f.vehicleId)return;if(!byVehicle.has(f.vehicleId))byVehicle.set(f.vehicleId,[]);byVehicle.get(f.vehicleId).push(f);});
07166:   const assets=(D.veh||[]).filter(v=>!vehicleId||v.id===vehicleId).map(v=>{
07167:     const fuel=byVehicle.get(v.id)||[],drivers=[...new Set(fuel.map(opsFuelDisplayDriver).filter(x=>x&&x!=='—'))],assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',assignedNorm=bh4NormName(assigned),driverMatched=!assigned||!drivers.length?null:drivers.some(x=>bh4NormName(x)===assignedNorm),openMaint=(OPS.maintenance||[]).find(m=>m.entityKind==='vehicle'&&m.entityId===v.id&&['pending_approval','approved','open','completed'].includes(m.status)),expected=bh4DieselExpected(v);
07168:     let effectiveStatus=bh4StatusLabel(v);if(!v.operationalStatus&&openMaint)effectiveStatus='في الصيانة';
07169:     const appeared=fuel.length>0,needsClass=!appeared&&expected===null,missingExpected=!appeared&&expected===true,conflict=appeared&&['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||'');
07170:     let review='مطابق';if(conflict)review='ظهر ديزل رغم أن الحالة غير تشغيلية';else if(missingExpected)review='متوقع في الخدمة ولم يظهر';else if(needsClass)review='حدد الحالة التشغيلية';else if(driverMatched===false)review='السائق في التقرير مختلف';else if(!appeared)review='لا توجد تعبئة في الفترة';
07171:     return {vehicle:v,fuel,appeared,fills:fuel.length,liters:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.liters),0),amount:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.cost),0),drivers,assigned,effectiveStatus,expected,needsClass,missingExpected,conflict,driverMatched,review};
07172:   });
07173:   const imports=(OPS.fuelImports||[]).filter(x=>bh4DateOverlap(x.from,x.to,from,to)),unmatched=[...new Set(imports.flatMap(x=>x.unmatchedPlates||[]))];
07174:   return {assets,rows,unmatched,total:assets.length,appeared:assets.filter(x=>x.appeared).length,notAppeared:assets.filter(x=>!x.appeared).length,needsClass:assets.filter(x=>x.needsClass).length,missingExpected:assets.filter(x=>x.missingExpected).length,conflicts:assets.filter(x=>x.conflict||x.driverMatched===false).length};
07175: }

07143: <script id="binhamid-control-v4-script">
07144: (function(){
07145: 'use strict';
07146: const BH4_VERSION='2026.07.14-control-v4-fleet-reconciliation-customer-credit';
07147: const BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES=[
07148:   ['', 'غير محدد'],['in_service','في الخدمة'],['parked','مركون / احتياطي'],['stopped','متوقف'],['maintenance','في الصيانة'],['out_of_service','خارج الخدمة'],['sold','مباع / مستبعد']
07149: ];
07150: const BH4_DIESEL_EXPECT=[['auto','حسب الحالة التشغيلية'],['yes','متوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل'],['no','لا يُتوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل']];
07151: function bh4N(v){const n=Number(v||0);return Number.isFinite(n)?n:0;}
07152: function bh4StatusLabel(v){return (BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.find(x=>x[0]===String(v?.operationalStatus||''))||BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES[0])[1];}
07153: function bh4StatusClass(v){return ({in_service:'active',parked:'parked',maintenance:'maintenance',stopped:'stopped',out_of_service:'out',sold:'out'})[v?.operationalStatus]||'';}
07154: function bh4DieselExpected(v){const m=String(v?.dieselExpected||'auto');if(m==='yes')return true;if(m==='no')return false;if(v?.operationalStatus==='in_service')return true;if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v?.operationalStatus))return false;return null;}
07155: function bh4StatusChip(v){return `<span class="bh4-status ${bh4StatusClass(v)}">${opsEsc(bh4StatusLabel(v))}</span>`;}
07156: function bh4NormName(v){return String(v||'').normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u064B-\u065F\u0670]/g,'').replace(/[أإآ]/g,'ا').replace(/ى/g,'ي').replace(/ة/g,'ه').replace(/[^\p{L}\p{N}]+/gu,'').toLowerCase();}
07157: function bh4DateOverlap(a1,a2,b1,b2){return (!a2||!b1||a2>=b1)&&(!b2||!a1||b2>=a1);}
07158: function bh4CustomerBalanceText(l){if(l.creditBalance>0)return `رصيد دائن ${opsMoney(l.creditBalance)} ر.س`;if(l.remaining>0)return `رصيد مدين ${opsMoney(l.remaining)} ر.س`;return 'الرصيد مسدد';}
07159: function bh4AllCredits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).creditBalance),0);}
07160: function bh4AllDebits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).remaining),0);}
07161: window.bh4AllCredits=bh4AllCredits;
07162: 
07163: function bh4Reconciliation(from,to,vehicleId){
07164:   const rows=opsDieselRows(from,to,vehicleId||''),byVehicle=new Map();
07165:   rows.forEach(f=>{if(!f.vehicleId)return;if(!byVehicle.has(f.vehicleId))byVehicle.set(f.vehicleId,[]);byVehicle.get(f.vehicleId).push(f);});
07166:   const assets=(D.veh||[]).filter(v=>!vehicleId||v.id===vehicleId).map(v=>{
07167:     const fuel=byVehicle.get(v.id)||[],drivers=[...new Set(fuel.map(opsFuelDisplayDriver).filter(x=>x&&x!=='—'))],assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',assignedNorm=bh4NormName(assigned),driverMatched=!assigned||!drivers.length?null:drivers.some(x=>bh4NormName(x)===assignedNorm),openMaint=(OPS.maintenance||[]).find(m=>m.entityKind==='vehicle'&&m.entityId===v.id&&['pending_approval','approved','open','completed'].includes(m.status)),expected=bh4DieselExpected(v);
07168:     let effectiveStatus=bh4StatusLabel(v);if(!v.operationalStatus&&openMaint)effectiveStatus='في الصيانة';
07169:     const appeared=fuel.length>0,needsClass=!appeared&&expected===null,missingExpected=!appeared&&expected===true,conflict=appeared&&['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||'');
07170:     let review='مطابق';if(conflict)review='ظهر ديزل رغم أن الحالة غير تشغيلية';else if(missingExpected)review='متوقع في الخدمة ولم يظهر';else if(needsClass)review='حدد الحالة التشغيلية';else if(driverMatched===false)review='السائق في التقرير مختلف';else if(!appeared)review='لا توجد تعبئة في الفترة';
07171:     return {vehicle:v,fuel,appeared,fills:fuel.length,liters:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.liters),0),amount:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.cost),0),drivers,assigned,effectiveStatus,expected,needsClass,missingExpected,conflict,driverMatched,review};
07172:   });
07173:   const imports=(OPS.fuelImports||[]).filter(x=>bh4DateOverlap(x.from,x.to,from,to)),unmatched=[...new Set(imports.flatMap(x=>x.unmatchedPlates||[]))];
07174:   return {assets,rows,unmatched,total:assets.length,appeared:assets.filter(x=>x.appeared).length,notAppeared:assets.filter(x=>!x.appeared).length,needsClass:assets.filter(x=>x.needsClass).length,missingExpected:assets.filter(x=>x.missingExpected).length,conflicts:assets.filter(x=>x.conflict||x.driverMatched===false).length};
07175: }
07176: window.bh4Reconciliation=bh4Reconciliation;

07178: function bh4ReconciliationTable(rec,interactive){
07179:   if(!rec.assets.length)return opsEmpty('لا توجد أصول مطابقة للنطاق','');
07180:   return `<div class="ops-table-wrap"><table class="ops-table"><thead><tr><th>رقم الأصل</th><th>اللوحة / التشغيل</th><th>النوع</th><th>السائق المعتمد</th><th>السائق في التقرير</th><th>الحالة التشغيلية</th><th>ظهوره في الديزل</th><th>اللترات</th><th>نتيجة المطابقة</th>${interactive?'<th></th>':''}</tr></thead><tbody>${rec.assets.map(x=>`<tr><td class="mono">${opsEsc(x.vehicle.acct||'—')}</td><td><b>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.plate||'—')}</b></td><td>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.type||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.assigned||'غير مُسند')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.drivers.join('، ')||'—')}</td><td>${bh4StatusChip(x.vehicle)}<div class="muted">${x.expected===true?'متوقع بالديزل':x.expected===false?'غير متوقع بالديزل':'التوقع غير محدد'}</div></td><td>${x.appeared?`<span class="ops-status">ظهر — ${x.fills} تعبئة</span>`:'<span class="ops-status muted">لم يظهر</span>'}</td><td class="num">${x.liters?opsNum(x.liters):'—'}</td><td>${x.conflict||x.missingExpected||x.driverMatched===false?`<span class="ops-status warn">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`:x.needsClass?`<span class="ops-status info">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`:`<span class="ops-status">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`}</td>${interactive?`<td><button class="ops-btn ghost sm" onclick="bh4VehicleStatusForm('${x.vehicle.id}')">تحديد الحالة</button></td>`:''}</tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`;
07181: }

07189: window.vehForm=function(id){

07143: <script id="binhamid-control-v4-script">
07144: (function(){
07145: 'use strict';
07146: const BH4_VERSION='2026.07.14-control-v4-fleet-reconciliation-customer-credit';
07147: const BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES=[
07148:   ['', 'غير محدد'],['in_service','في الخدمة'],['parked','مركون / احتياطي'],['stopped','متوقف'],['maintenance','في الصيانة'],['out_of_service','خارج الخدمة'],['sold','مباع / مستبعد']
07149: ];
07150: const BH4_DIESEL_EXPECT=[['auto','حسب الحالة التشغيلية'],['yes','متوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل'],['no','لا يُتوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل']];
07151: function bh4N(v){const n=Number(v||0);return Number.isFinite(n)?n:0;}
07152: function bh4StatusLabel(v){return (BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.find(x=>x[0]===String(v?.operationalStatus||''))||BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES[0])[1];}
07153: function bh4StatusClass(v){return ({in_service:'active',parked:'parked',maintenance:'maintenance',stopped:'stopped',out_of_service:'out',sold:'out'})[v?.operationalStatus]||'';}
07154: function bh4DieselExpected(v){const m=String(v?.dieselExpected||'auto');if(m==='yes')return true;if(m==='no')return false;if(v?.operationalStatus==='in_service')return true;if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v?.operationalStatus))return false;return null;}
07155: function bh4StatusChip(v){return `<span class="bh4-status ${bh4StatusClass(v)}">${opsEsc(bh4StatusLabel(v))}</span>`;}
07156: function bh4NormName(v){return String(v||'').normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u064B-\u065F\u0670]/g,'').replace(/[أإآ]/g,'ا').replace(/ى/g,'ي').replace(/ة/g,'ه').replace(/[^\p{L}\p{N}]+/gu,'').toLowerCase();}
07157: function bh4DateOverlap(a1,a2,b1,b2){return (!a2||!b1||a2>=b1)&&(!b2||!a1||b2>=a1);}
07158: function bh4CustomerBalanceText(l){if(l.creditBalance>0)return `رصيد دائن ${opsMoney(l.creditBalance)} ر.س`;if(l.remaining>0)return `رصيد مدين ${opsMoney(l.remaining)} ر.س`;return 'الرصيد مسدد';}
07159: function bh4AllCredits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).creditBalance),0);}
07160: function bh4AllDebits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).remaining),0);}
07161: window.bh4AllCredits=bh4AllCredits;

07163: function bh4Reconciliation(from,to,vehicleId){
07164:   const rows=opsDieselRows(from,to,vehicleId||''),byVehicle=new Map();
07165:   rows.forEach(f=>{if(!f.vehicleId)return;if(!byVehicle.has(f.vehicleId))byVehicle.set(f.vehicleId,[]);byVehicle.get(f.vehicleId).push(f);});
07166:   const assets=(D.veh||[]).filter(v=>!vehicleId||v.id===vehicleId).map(v=>{
07167:     const fuel=byVehicle.get(v.id)||[],drivers=[...new Set(fuel.map(opsFuelDisplayDriver).filter(x=>x&&x!=='—'))],assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',assignedNorm=bh4NormName(assigned),driverMatched=!assigned||!drivers.length?null:drivers.some(x=>bh4NormName(x)===assignedNorm),openMaint=(OPS.maintenance||[]).find(m=>m.entityKind==='vehicle'&&m.entityId===v.id&&['pending_approval','approved','open','completed'].includes(m.status)),expected=bh4DieselExpected(v);
07168:     let effectiveStatus=bh4StatusLabel(v);if(!v.operationalStatus&&openMaint)effectiveStatus='في الصيانة';
07169:     const appeared=fuel.length>0,needsClass=!appeared&&expected===null,missingExpected=!appeared&&expected===true,conflict=appeared&&['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||'');
07170:     let review='مطابق';if(conflict)review='ظهر ديزل رغم أن الحالة غير تشغيلية';else if(missingExpected)review='متوقع في الخدمة ولم يظهر';else if(needsClass)review='حدد الحالة التشغيلية';else if(driverMatched===false)review='السائق في التقرير مختلف';else if(!appeared)review='لا توجد تعبئة في الفترة';
07171:     return {vehicle:v,fuel,appeared,fills:fuel.length,liters:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.liters),0),amount:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.cost),0),drivers,assigned,effectiveStatus,expected,needsClass,missingExpected,conflict,driverMatched,review};
07172:   });
07173:   const imports=(OPS.fuelImports||[]).filter(x=>bh4DateOverlap(x.from,x.to,from,to)),unmatched=[...new Set(imports.flatMap(x=>x.unmatchedPlates||[]))];
07174:   return {assets,rows,unmatched,total:assets.length,appeared:assets.filter(x=>x.appeared).length,notAppeared:assets.filter(x=>!x.appeared).length,needsClass:assets.filter(x=>x.needsClass).length,missingExpected:assets.filter(x=>x.missingExpected).length,conflicts:assets.filter(x=>x.conflict||x.driverMatched===false).length};
07175: }
07176: window.bh4Reconciliation=bh4Reconciliation;

07178: function bh4ReconciliationTable(rec,interactive){
07179:   if(!rec.assets.length)return opsEmpty('لا توجد أصول مطابقة للنطاق','');
07180:   return `<div class="ops-table-wrap"><table class="ops-table"><thead><tr><th>رقم الأصل</th><th>اللوحة / التشغيل</th><th>النوع</th><th>السائق المعتمد</th><th>السائق في التقرير</th><th>الحالة التشغيلية</th><th>ظهوره في الديزل</th><th>اللترات</th><th>نتيجة المطابقة</th>${interactive?'<th></th>':''}</tr></thead><tbody>${rec.assets.map(x=>`<tr><td class="mono">${opsEsc(x.vehicle.acct||'—')}</td><td><b>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.plate||'—')}</b></td><td>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.type||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.assigned||'غير مُسند')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.drivers.join('، ')||'—')}</td><td>${bh4StatusChip(x.vehicle)}<div class="muted">${x.expected===true?'متوقع بالديزل':x.expected===false?'غير متوقع بالديزل':'التوقع غير محدد'}</div></td><td>${x.appeared?`<span class="ops-status">ظهر — ${x.fills} تعبئة</span>`:'<span class="ops-status muted">لم يظهر</span>'}</td><td class="num">${x.liters?opsNum(x.liters):'—'}</td><td>${x.conflict||x.missingExpected||x.driverMatched===false?`<span class="ops-status warn">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`:x.needsClass?`<span class="ops-status info">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`:`<span class="ops-status">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`}</td>${interactive?`<td><button class="ops-btn ghost sm" onclick="bh4VehicleStatusForm('${x.vehicle.id}')">تحديد الحالة</button></td>`:''}</tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`;

07216: window.opsDieselControlData=function(rows){const c=bh4BaseDieselControl(rows),added=[];const add=(f,level,check,detail)=>added.push({fuelId:f.id,level,check,detail,date:f.date,plate:opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),receipt:f.receipt||f.no||'—'});(rows||[]).forEach(f=>{const v=opsVeh(f.vehicleId);if(!v)return;const assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',reported=opsFuelDisplayDriver(f);if(assigned&&reported&&reported!=='—'&&bh4NormName(assigned)!==bh4NormName(reported))add(f,'warn','اختلاف السائق',`المسند في الأصول: ${assigned} — الوارد بالتقرير: ${reported}`);if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||''))add(f,'warn','تعبئة لا تتفق مع حالة الأصل',`الحالة المسجلة: ${bh4StatusLabel(v)}`);});c.alerts.push(...added);const rank={danger:0,warn:1,info:2};c.alerts.sort((a,b)=>(rank[a.level]-rank[b.level])||String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));c.byFuel=new Map();c.alerts.forEach(a=>{if(!c.byFuel.has(a.fuelId))c.byFuel.set(a.fuelId,[]);c.byFuel.get(a.fuelId).push(a);});c.danger=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='danger').length;c.warn=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='warn').length;c.info=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='info').length;return c;};

07143: <script id="binhamid-control-v4-script">
07144: (function(){
07145: 'use strict';
07146: const BH4_VERSION='2026.07.14-control-v4-fleet-reconciliation-customer-credit';
07147: const BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES=[
07148:   ['', 'غير محدد'],['in_service','في الخدمة'],['parked','مركون / احتياطي'],['stopped','متوقف'],['maintenance','في الصيانة'],['out_of_service','خارج الخدمة'],['sold','مباع / مستبعد']
07149: ];
07150: const BH4_DIESEL_EXPECT=[['auto','حسب الحالة التشغيلية'],['yes','متوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل'],['no','لا يُتوقع ظهوره في تقرير الديزل']];
07151: function bh4N(v){const n=Number(v||0);return Number.isFinite(n)?n:0;}
07152: function bh4StatusLabel(v){return (BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.find(x=>x[0]===String(v?.operationalStatus||''))||BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES[0])[1];}
07153: function bh4StatusClass(v){return ({in_service:'active',parked:'parked',maintenance:'maintenance',stopped:'stopped',out_of_service:'out',sold:'out'})[v?.operationalStatus]||'';}
07154: function bh4DieselExpected(v){const m=String(v?.dieselExpected||'auto');if(m==='yes')return true;if(m==='no')return false;if(v?.operationalStatus==='in_service')return true;if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v?.operationalStatus))return false;return null;}
07155: function bh4StatusChip(v){return `<span class="bh4-status ${bh4StatusClass(v)}">${opsEsc(bh4StatusLabel(v))}</span>`;}
07156: function bh4NormName(v){return String(v||'').normalize('NFKD').replace(/[\u064B-\u065F\u0670]/g,'').replace(/[أإآ]/g,'ا').replace(/ى/g,'ي').replace(/ة/g,'ه').replace(/[^\p{L}\p{N}]+/gu,'').toLowerCase();}
07157: function bh4DateOverlap(a1,a2,b1,b2){return (!a2||!b1||a2>=b1)&&(!b2||!a1||b2>=a1);}
07158: function bh4CustomerBalanceText(l){if(l.creditBalance>0)return `رصيد دائن ${opsMoney(l.creditBalance)} ر.س`;if(l.remaining>0)return `رصيد مدين ${opsMoney(l.remaining)} ر.س`;return 'الرصيد مسدد';}
07159: function bh4AllCredits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).creditBalance),0);}
07160: function bh4AllDebits(){return (D.cli||[]).reduce((s,c)=>s+bh4N(window.bhClientLedger(c.id).remaining),0);}
07161: window.bh4AllCredits=bh4AllCredits;

07163: function bh4Reconciliation(from,to,vehicleId){
07164:   const rows=opsDieselRows(from,to,vehicleId||''),byVehicle=new Map();
07165:   rows.forEach(f=>{if(!f.vehicleId)return;if(!byVehicle.has(f.vehicleId))byVehicle.set(f.vehicleId,[]);byVehicle.get(f.vehicleId).push(f);});
07166:   const assets=(D.veh||[]).filter(v=>!vehicleId||v.id===vehicleId).map(v=>{
07167:     const fuel=byVehicle.get(v.id)||[],drivers=[...new Set(fuel.map(opsFuelDisplayDriver).filter(x=>x&&x!=='—'))],assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',assignedNorm=bh4NormName(assigned),driverMatched=!assigned||!drivers.length?null:drivers.some(x=>bh4NormName(x)===assignedNorm),openMaint=(OPS.maintenance||[]).find(m=>m.entityKind==='vehicle'&&m.entityId===v.id&&['pending_approval','approved','open','completed'].includes(m.status)),expected=bh4DieselExpected(v);
07168:     let effectiveStatus=bh4StatusLabel(v);if(!v.operationalStatus&&openMaint)effectiveStatus='في الصيانة';
07169:     const appeared=fuel.length>0,needsClass=!appeared&&expected===null,missingExpected=!appeared&&expected===true,conflict=appeared&&['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||'');
07170:     let review='مطابق';if(conflict)review='ظهر ديزل رغم أن الحالة غير تشغيلية';else if(missingExpected)review='متوقع في الخدمة ولم يظهر';else if(needsClass)review='حدد الحالة التشغيلية';else if(driverMatched===false)review='السائق في التقرير مختلف';else if(!appeared)review='لا توجد تعبئة في الفترة';
07171:     return {vehicle:v,fuel,appeared,fills:fuel.length,liters:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.liters),0),amount:fuel.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.cost),0),drivers,assigned,effectiveStatus,expected,needsClass,missingExpected,conflict,driverMatched,review};
07172:   });
07173:   const imports=(OPS.fuelImports||[]).filter(x=>bh4DateOverlap(x.from,x.to,from,to)),unmatched=[...new Set(imports.flatMap(x=>x.unmatchedPlates||[]))];
07174:   return {assets,rows,unmatched,total:assets.length,appeared:assets.filter(x=>x.appeared).length,notAppeared:assets.filter(x=>!x.appeared).length,needsClass:assets.filter(x=>x.needsClass).length,missingExpected:assets.filter(x=>x.missingExpected).length,conflicts:assets.filter(x=>x.conflict||x.driverMatched===false).length};
07175: }

07189: window.vehForm=function(id){

07216: window.opsDieselControlData=function(rows){const c=bh4BaseDieselControl(rows),added=[];const add=(f,level,check,detail)=>added.push({fuelId:f.id,level,check,detail,date:f.date,plate:opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),receipt:f.receipt||f.no||'—'});(rows||[]).forEach(f=>{const v=opsVeh(f.vehicleId);if(!v)return;const assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',reported=opsFuelDisplayDriver(f);if(assigned&&reported&&reported!=='—'&&bh4NormName(assigned)!==bh4NormName(reported))add(f,'warn','اختلاف السائق',`المسند في الأصول: ${assigned} — الوارد بالتقرير: ${reported}`);if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||''))add(f,'warn','تعبئة لا تتفق مع حالة الأصل',`الحالة المسجلة: ${bh4StatusLabel(v)}`);});c.alerts.push(...added);const rank={danger:0,warn:1,info:2};c.alerts.sort((a,b)=>(rank[a.level]-rank[b.level])||String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));c.byFuel=new Map();c.alerts.forEach(a=>{if(!c.byFuel.has(a.fuelId))c.byFuel.set(a.fuelId,[]);c.byFuel.get(a.fuelId).push(a);});c.danger=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='danger').length;c.warn=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='warn').length;c.info=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='info').length;return c;};

07227: window.opsPrintDieselReport=function(from,to,vehicleId){
07228:   const rows=opsDieselRows(from,to,vehicleId),control=window.opsDieselControlData(rows),summary=opsDieselVehicleSummary(rows,control),rec=bh4Reconciliation(from,to,vehicleId),liters=rows.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.liters),0),amount=rows.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.cost),0),beforeTax=rows.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.beforeTax),0),tax=rows.reduce((s,x)=>s+bh4N(x.tax),0);
07229:   const recHtml=`<h2 style="font-size:12pt;margin:0 0 3mm">مطابقة الأصول مع تقرير الديزل</h2><table style="margin-bottom:5mm"><thead><tr><th>رقم الأصل</th><th>اللوحة</th><th>النوع</th><th>السائق المعتمد</th><th>السائق بالتقرير</th><th>الحالة</th><th>الظهور</th><th>اللترات</th><th>النتيجة</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rec.assets.map(x=>`<tr><td>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.acct||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.plate||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.type||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.assigned||'غير مسند')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.drivers.join('، ')||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.effectiveStatus)}</td><td>${x.appeared?x.fills+' تعبئة':'لم يظهر'}</td><td>${x.liters?opsNum(x.liters):'—'}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.review)}</td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table>`;
07230:   const alertsHtml=control.alerts.length?`<h2 style="font-size:12pt;margin:0 0 3mm">ملاحظات الرقابة المطلوب مراجعتها</h2><table style="margin-bottom:5mm"><thead><tr><th>الأولوية</th><th>التاريخ</th><th>اللوحة</th><th>الفحص</th><th>سبب المراجعة</th><th>الإيصال</th></tr></thead><tbody>${control.alerts.map(a=>`<tr><td>${a.level==='danger'?'عاجل':a.level==='warn'?'مراجعة':'استكمال'}</td><td>${opsFmtDateTime(a.date)}</td><td>${opsEsc(a.plate)}</td><td>${opsEsc(a.check)}</td><td>${opsEsc(a.detail)}</td><td>${opsEsc(a.receipt)}</td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table>`:'<div style="border:1px solid #9bb7aa;background:#f1f8f4;padding:3mm;margin-bottom:5mm">لا توجد ملاحظات على التعبئات المسجلة.</div>';
07231:   const summaryHtml=rows.length?`<h2 style="font-size:12pt;margin:0 0 3mm">ملخص الاستهلاك حسب المركبة</h2><table style="margin-bottom:5mm"><thead><tr><th>اللوحة</th><th>المركبة</th><th>التعبئات</th><th>اللترات</th><th>الحصة</th><th>المبلغ</th><th>كم/لتر</th><th>الملاحظات</th></tr></thead><tbody>${summary.map(x=>`<tr><td>${opsEsc(x.plate)}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.vehicle)}</td><td>${x.fills}</td><td>${opsNum(x.liters)}</td><td>${opsNum(x.share)}%</td><td>${opsMoney(x.amount)}</td><td>${x.kmPerLiter?opsNum(x.kmPerLiter):'—'}</td><td>${x.alerts||'—'}</td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table>`:'<div style="padding:3mm;border:1px solid #ccd5d9;margin-bottom:5mm">لا توجد تعبئات في الفترة؛ التقرير يعرض حالة الأصول ومطابقتها فقط.</div>';
07232:   const detail=rows.map(f=>{const A=control.byFuel.get(f.id)||[];return {'التاريخ والوقت':opsFmtDateTime(f.date),'الإيصال':f.receipt||f.no,'اللوحة':opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),'السائق':opsFuelDisplayDriver(f),'المحطة':f.station||'—','اللترات':opsNum(f.liters),'سعر اللتر':opsMoney(opsFuelUnitPrice(f)),'الإجمالي':opsMoney(f.cost),'نتيجة الرقابة':A.length?A.map(a=>a.check).join('، '):'سليم حسب القواعد'};});
07233:   opsPrintReport('تقرير مطابقة الأصول والرقابة على الديزل',[['الفترة',`${opsFmtDate(from)} إلى ${opsFmtDate(to)}`],['الأصل المحدد',vehicleId?opsEntityLabel('vehicle',vehicleId):'كل الأصول'],['إجمالي الأصول',rec.total],['ظهرت في الديزل',rec.appeared],['لم تظهر',rec.notAppeared],['تحتاج تحديد حالة',rec.needsClass],['لوحات غير مطابقة',rec.unmatched.length],['عدد التعبئات',rows.length],['إجمالي الكمية',`${opsNum(liters)} لتر`],['الصافي شامل الضريبة',`${opsMoney(amount)} ر.س`],['نتيجة الرقابة',`${control.danger} عاجل — ${control.warn} مراجعة — ${control.info} استكمال`]],detail,`diesel-fleet-control:${from}:${to}:${vehicleId||'all'}`,[{label:'إعداد مسؤول الحركة'},{label:'مراجعة الحسابات'},{label:'اعتماد المدير'},{label:'ختم المنشأة',type:'stamp'}],{landscape:true,beforeTable:recHtml+alertsHtml+summaryHtml+(detail.length?'<h2 style="font-size:12pt;margin:0 0 3mm">تفاصيل التعبئات</h2>':'')});

07178: function bh4ReconciliationTable(rec,interactive){
07179:   if(!rec.assets.length)return opsEmpty('لا توجد أصول مطابقة للنطاق','');
07180:   return `<div class="ops-table-wrap"><table class="ops-table"><thead><tr><th>رقم الأصل</th><th>اللوحة / التشغيل</th><th>النوع</th><th>السائق المعتمد</th><th>السائق في التقرير</th><th>الحالة التشغيلية</th><th>ظهوره في الديزل</th><th>اللترات</th><th>نتيجة المطابقة</th>${interactive?'<th></th>':''}</tr></thead><tbody>${rec.assets.map(x=>`<tr><td class="mono">${opsEsc(x.vehicle.acct||'—')}</td><td><b>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.plate||'—')}</b></td><td>${opsEsc(x.vehicle.type||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.assigned||'غير مُسند')}</td><td>${opsEsc(x.drivers.join('، ')||'—')}</td><td>${bh4StatusChip(x.vehicle)}<div class="muted">${x.expected===true?'متوقع بالديزل':x.expected===false?'غير متوقع بالديزل':'التوقع غير محدد'}</div></td><td>${x.appeared?`<span class="ops-status">ظهر — ${x.fills} تعبئة</span>`:'<span class="ops-status muted">لم يظهر</span>'}</td><td class="num">${x.liters?opsNum(x.liters):'—'}</td><td>${x.conflict||x.missingExpected||x.driverMatched===false?`<span class="ops-status warn">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`:x.needsClass?`<span class="ops-status info">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`:`<span class="ops-status">${opsEsc(x.review)}</span>`}</td>${interactive?`<td><button class="ops-btn ghost sm" onclick="bh4VehicleStatusForm('${x.vehicle.id}')">تحديد الحالة</button></td>`:''}</tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`;
07181: }

07216: window.opsDieselControlData=function(rows){const c=bh4BaseDieselControl(rows),added=[];const add=(f,level,check,detail)=>added.push({fuelId:f.id,level,check,detail,date:f.date,plate:opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),receipt:f.receipt||f.no||'—'});(rows||[]).forEach(f=>{const v=opsVeh(f.vehicleId);if(!v)return;const assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',reported=opsFuelDisplayDriver(f);if(assigned&&reported&&reported!=='—'&&bh4NormName(assigned)!==bh4NormName(reported))add(f,'warn','اختلاف السائق',`المسند في الأصول: ${assigned} — الوارد بالتقرير: ${reported}`);if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||''))add(f,'warn','تعبئة لا تتفق مع حالة الأصل',`الحالة المسجلة: ${bh4StatusLabel(v)}`);});c.alerts.push(...added);const rank={danger:0,warn:1,info:2};c.alerts.sort((a,b)=>(rank[a.level]-rank[b.level])||String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));c.byFuel=new Map();c.alerts.forEach(a=>{if(!c.byFuel.has(a.fuelId))c.byFuel.set(a.fuelId,[]);c.byFuel.get(a.fuelId).push(a);});c.danger=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='danger').length;c.warn=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='warn').length;c.info=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='info').length;return c;};

07214: /* Extend the fuel checks with asset status and assigned-driver reconciliation. */
07215: const bh4BaseDieselControl=window.opsDieselControlData||opsDieselControlData;
07216: window.opsDieselControlData=function(rows){const c=bh4BaseDieselControl(rows),added=[];const add=(f,level,check,detail)=>added.push({fuelId:f.id,level,check,detail,date:f.date,plate:opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),receipt:f.receipt||f.no||'—'});(rows||[]).forEach(f=>{const v=opsVeh(f.vehicleId);if(!v)return;const assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',reported=opsFuelDisplayDriver(f);if(assigned&&reported&&reported!=='—'&&bh4NormName(assigned)!==bh4NormName(reported))add(f,'warn','اختلاف السائق',`المسند في الأصول: ${assigned} — الوارد بالتقرير: ${reported}`);if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||''))add(f,'warn','تعبئة لا تتفق مع حالة الأصل',`الحالة المسجلة: ${bh4StatusLabel(v)}`);});c.alerts.push(...added);const rank={danger:0,warn:1,info:2};c.alerts.sort((a,b)=>(rank[a.level]-rank[b.level])||String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));c.byFuel=new Map();c.alerts.forEach(a=>{if(!c.byFuel.has(a.fuelId))c.byFuel.set(a.fuelId,[]);c.byFuel.get(a.fuelId).push(a);});c.danger=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='danger').length;c.warn=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='warn').length;c.info=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='info').length;return c;};

07218: window.opsShowDieselReport=function(from,to,vehicleId){

07259: const bh5BaseDefaults=opsDefaults;
07260: opsDefaults=function(){
07261:   const x=bh5BaseDefaults();
07262:   x.driverTransfers=[];
07263:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:1};
07264:   return x;
07265: };
07266: const bh5BaseMerge=opsMergeState;
07267: opsMergeState=function(raw){
07268:   const x=bh5BaseMerge(raw);
07269:   x.driverTransfers=Array.isArray(raw?.driverTransfers)?raw.driverTransfers:[];
07270:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:Number(raw?.meta?.sequences?.DTR||x.meta.sequences?.DTR||1)};
07271:   return x;
07272: };
07273: 
07274: function bh5EnsureState(){
07275:   if(!OPS)return false;
07276:   if(!Array.isArray(OPS.driverTransfers))OPS.driverTransfers=[];
07277:   OPS.meta=OPS.meta||{};OPS.meta.sequences=OPS.meta.sequences||{};
07278:   if(!OPS.meta.sequences.DTR)OPS.meta.sequences.DTR=1;
07279:   return true;
07280: }
07281: function bh5Drivers(){return (D.emp||[]).filter(e=>e.act!==false&&(/سائق|مشغّل/.test(e.role||'')));}

07284: function bh5DriverLabel(e){if(!e)return '—';return `${e.name}${e.no?' — '+e.no:''}`;}
07285: function bh5SnapshotVehicle(v){return v?{id:v.id,plate:v.plate||'',type:v.type||'',make:v.make||'',yr:v.yr||'',vin:v.vin||'',eng:v.eng||'',acct:v.acct||'',reg:v.reg||'',regE:v.regE||'',acc:v.acc||'',note:v.note||'',operationalStatus:v.operationalStatus||'',driverId:v.drv||''}:null;}
07286: function bh5SnapshotEmployee(e){return e?{id:e.id,name:e.name||'',role:e.role||'',nid:e.nid||'',no:e.no||'',tel:e.tel||'',lic:e.lic||'',licE:e.licE||''}:null;}

07216: window.opsDieselControlData=function(rows){const c=bh4BaseDieselControl(rows),added=[];const add=(f,level,check,detail)=>added.push({fuelId:f.id,level,check,detail,date:f.date,plate:opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),receipt:f.receipt||f.no||'—'});(rows||[]).forEach(f=>{const v=opsVeh(f.vehicleId);if(!v)return;const assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',reported=opsFuelDisplayDriver(f);if(assigned&&reported&&reported!=='—'&&bh4NormName(assigned)!==bh4NormName(reported))add(f,'warn','اختلاف السائق',`المسند في الأصول: ${assigned} — الوارد بالتقرير: ${reported}`);if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||''))add(f,'warn','تعبئة لا تتفق مع حالة الأصل',`الحالة المسجلة: ${bh4StatusLabel(v)}`);});c.alerts.push(...added);const rank={danger:0,warn:1,info:2};c.alerts.sort((a,b)=>(rank[a.level]-rank[b.level])||String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));c.byFuel=new Map();c.alerts.forEach(a=>{if(!c.byFuel.has(a.fuelId))c.byFuel.set(a.fuelId,[]);c.byFuel.get(a.fuelId).push(a);});c.danger=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='danger').length;c.warn=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='warn').length;c.info=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='info').length;return c;};

07250: <script id="binhamid-driver-transfer-v5">
07251: /* ============================================================
07252:    BIN HAMID V5 — DRIVER / VEHICLE TRANSFER CONTROL
07253:    ============================================================ */
07254: (function(){
07255: 'use strict';
07256: const BH5_VERSION='2026.07.14-control-v5-driver-vehicle-transfer';
07257: 
07258: /* Preserve transfer records when the V3 operations state is reloaded. */
07259: const bh5BaseDefaults=opsDefaults;
07260: opsDefaults=function(){
07261:   const x=bh5BaseDefaults();
07262:   x.driverTransfers=[];
07263:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:1};
07264:   return x;
07265: };
07266: const bh5BaseMerge=opsMergeState;
07267: opsMergeState=function(raw){
07268:   const x=bh5BaseMerge(raw);
07269:   x.driverTransfers=Array.isArray(raw?.driverTransfers)?raw.driverTransfers:[];
07270:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:Number(raw?.meta?.sequences?.DTR||x.meta.sequences?.DTR||1)};
07271:   return x;
07272: };
07273: 
07274: function bh5EnsureState(){
07275:   if(!OPS)return false;
07276:   if(!Array.isArray(OPS.driverTransfers))OPS.driverTransfers=[];
07277:   OPS.meta=OPS.meta||{};OPS.meta.sequences=OPS.meta.sequences||{};
07278:   if(!OPS.meta.sequences.DTR)OPS.meta.sequences.DTR=1;
07279:   return true;
07280: }
07281: function bh5Drivers(){return (D.emp||[]).filter(e=>e.act!==false&&(/سائق|مشغّل/.test(e.role||'')));}
07282: function bh5AssignedVehicles(driverId){return (D.veh||[]).filter(v=>v.drv===driverId);}
07283: function bh5VehLabel(v){if(!v)return '—';return `${v.plate||v.acct||'—'} — ${v.type||''}${v.make?' — '+v.make:''}`;}
07284: function bh5DriverLabel(e){if(!e)return '—';return `${e.name}${e.no?' — '+e.no:''}`;}
07285: function bh5SnapshotVehicle(v){return v?{id:v.id,plate:v.plate||'',type:v.type||'',make:v.make||'',yr:v.yr||'',vin:v.vin||'',eng:v.eng||'',acct:v.acct||'',reg:v.reg||'',regE:v.regE||'',acc:v.acc||'',note:v.note||'',operationalStatus:v.operationalStatus||'',driverId:v.drv||''}:null;}
07286: function bh5SnapshotEmployee(e){return e?{id:e.id,name:e.name||'',role:e.role||'',nid:e.nid||'',no:e.no||'',tel:e.tel||'',lic:e.lic||'',licE:e.licE||''}:null;}
07287: function bh5FuelOptions(selected){return ['غير محدد','فارغ','ربع الخزان','نصف الخزان','ثلاثة أرباع','ممتلئ'].map(x=>`<option ${x===selected?'selected':''}>${x}</option>`).join('');}
07288: function bh5OperationalOptions(selected){return BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.filter(x=>!['sold'].includes(x[0])).map(([k,l])=>`<option value="${k}" ${k===selected?'selected':''}>${l}</option>`).join('');}
07289: function bh5DateInRange(d,from,to){const x=String(d||'').slice(0,10);return (!from||x>=from)&&(!to||x<=to);}

07216: window.opsDieselControlData=function(rows){const c=bh4BaseDieselControl(rows),added=[];const add=(f,level,check,detail)=>added.push({fuelId:f.id,level,check,detail,date:f.date,plate:opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),receipt:f.receipt||f.no||'—'});(rows||[]).forEach(f=>{const v=opsVeh(f.vehicleId);if(!v)return;const assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',reported=opsFuelDisplayDriver(f);if(assigned&&reported&&reported!=='—'&&bh4NormName(assigned)!==bh4NormName(reported))add(f,'warn','اختلاف السائق',`المسند في الأصول: ${assigned} — الوارد بالتقرير: ${reported}`);if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||''))add(f,'warn','تعبئة لا تتفق مع حالة الأصل',`الحالة المسجلة: ${bh4StatusLabel(v)}`);});c.alerts.push(...added);const rank={danger:0,warn:1,info:2};c.alerts.sort((a,b)=>(rank[a.level]-rank[b.level])||String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));c.byFuel=new Map();c.alerts.forEach(a=>{if(!c.byFuel.has(a.fuelId))c.byFuel.set(a.fuelId,[]);c.byFuel.get(a.fuelId).push(a);});c.danger=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='danger').length;c.warn=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='warn').length;c.info=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='info').length;return c;};

07271:   return x;

07274: function bh5EnsureState(){

07276:   if(!Array.isArray(OPS.driverTransfers))OPS.driverTransfers=[];
07277:   OPS.meta=OPS.meta||{};OPS.meta.sequences=OPS.meta.sequences||{};

07216: window.opsDieselControlData=function(rows){const c=bh4BaseDieselControl(rows),added=[];const add=(f,level,check,detail)=>added.push({fuelId:f.id,level,check,detail,date:f.date,plate:opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),receipt:f.receipt||f.no||'—'});(rows||[]).forEach(f=>{const v=opsVeh(f.vehicleId);if(!v)return;const assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',reported=opsFuelDisplayDriver(f);if(assigned&&reported&&reported!=='—'&&bh4NormName(assigned)!==bh4NormName(reported))add(f,'warn','اختلاف السائق',`المسند في الأصول: ${assigned} — الوارد بالتقرير: ${reported}`);if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||''))add(f,'warn','تعبئة لا تتفق مع حالة الأصل',`الحالة المسجلة: ${bh4StatusLabel(v)}`);});c.alerts.push(...added);const rank={danger:0,warn:1,info:2};c.alerts.sort((a,b)=>(rank[a.level]-rank[b.level])||String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));c.byFuel=new Map();c.alerts.forEach(a=>{if(!c.byFuel.has(a.fuelId))c.byFuel.set(a.fuelId,[]);c.byFuel.get(a.fuelId).push(a);});c.danger=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='danger').length;c.warn=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='warn').length;c.info=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='info').length;return c;};

07263:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:1};

07269:   x.driverTransfers=Array.isArray(raw?.driverTransfers)?raw.driverTransfers:[];
07270:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:Number(raw?.meta?.sequences?.DTR||x.meta.sequences?.DTR||1)};
07271:   return x;
07272: };

07274: function bh5EnsureState(){
07275:   if(!OPS)return false;
07276:   if(!Array.isArray(OPS.driverTransfers))OPS.driverTransfers=[];
07277:   OPS.meta=OPS.meta||{};OPS.meta.sequences=OPS.meta.sequences||{};
07278:   if(!OPS.meta.sequences.DTR)OPS.meta.sequences.DTR=1;
07279:   return true;

07216: window.opsDieselControlData=function(rows){const c=bh4BaseDieselControl(rows),added=[];const add=(f,level,check,detail)=>added.push({fuelId:f.id,level,check,detail,date:f.date,plate:opsFuelDisplayPlate(f),receipt:f.receipt||f.no||'—'});(rows||[]).forEach(f=>{const v=opsVeh(f.vehicleId);if(!v)return;const assigned=opsEmp(v.drv)?.name||'',reported=opsFuelDisplayDriver(f);if(assigned&&reported&&reported!=='—'&&bh4NormName(assigned)!==bh4NormName(reported))add(f,'warn','اختلاف السائق',`المسند في الأصول: ${assigned} — الوارد بالتقرير: ${reported}`);if(['parked','stopped','maintenance','out_of_service','sold'].includes(v.operationalStatus||''))add(f,'warn','تعبئة لا تتفق مع حالة الأصل',`الحالة المسجلة: ${bh4StatusLabel(v)}`);});c.alerts.push(...added);const rank={danger:0,warn:1,info:2};c.alerts.sort((a,b)=>(rank[a.level]-rank[b.level])||String(a.date).localeCompare(String(b.date)));c.byFuel=new Map();c.alerts.forEach(a=>{if(!c.byFuel.has(a.fuelId))c.byFuel.set(a.fuelId,[]);c.byFuel.get(a.fuelId).push(a);});c.danger=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='danger').length;c.warn=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='warn').length;c.info=c.alerts.filter(x=>x.level==='info').length;return c;};

07263:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:1};

07269:   x.driverTransfers=Array.isArray(raw?.driverTransfers)?raw.driverTransfers:[];
07270:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:Number(raw?.meta?.sequences?.DTR||x.meta.sequences?.DTR||1)};
07271:   return x;
07272: };

07274: function bh5EnsureState(){
07275:   if(!OPS)return false;
07276:   if(!Array.isArray(OPS.driverTransfers))OPS.driverTransfers=[];
07277:   OPS.meta=OPS.meta||{};OPS.meta.sequences=OPS.meta.sequences||{};
07278:   if(!OPS.meta.sequences.DTR)OPS.meta.sequences.DTR=1;
07279:   return true;

07286: function bh5SnapshotEmployee(e){return e?{id:e.id,name:e.name||'',role:e.role||'',nid:e.nid||'',no:e.no||'',tel:e.tel||'',lic:e.lic||'',licE:e.licE||''}:null;}

07250: <script id="binhamid-driver-transfer-v5">

07254: (function(){

07257: 
07258: /* Preserve transfer records when the V3 operations state is reloaded. */
07259: const bh5BaseDefaults=opsDefaults;
07260: opsDefaults=function(){
07261:   const x=bh5BaseDefaults();
07262:   x.driverTransfers=[];
07263:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:1};
07264:   return x;
07265: };
07266: const bh5BaseMerge=opsMergeState;
07267: opsMergeState=function(raw){
07268:   const x=bh5BaseMerge(raw);
07269:   x.driverTransfers=Array.isArray(raw?.driverTransfers)?raw.driverTransfers:[];
07270:   x.meta.sequences={...(x.meta.sequences||{}),DTR:Number(raw?.meta?.sequences?.DTR||x.meta.sequences?.DTR||1)};
07271:   return x;
07272: };
07273: 
07274: function bh5EnsureState(){
07275:   if(!OPS)return false;
07276:   if(!Array.isArray(OPS.driverTransfers))OPS.driverTransfers=[];
07277:   OPS.meta=OPS.meta||{};OPS.meta.sequences=OPS.meta.sequences||{};
07278:   if(!OPS.meta.sequences.DTR)OPS.meta.sequences.DTR=1;
07279:   return true;
07280: }
07281: function bh5Drivers(){return (D.emp||[]).filter(e=>e.act!==false&&(/سائق|مشغّل/.test(e.role||'')));}
07282: function bh5AssignedVehicles(driverId){return (D.veh||[]).filter(v=>v.drv===driverId);}
07283: function bh5VehLabel(v){if(!v)return '—';return `${v.plate||v.acct||'—'} — ${v.type||''}${v.make?' — '+v.make:''}`;}
07284: function bh5DriverLabel(e){if(!e)return '—';return `${e.name}${e.no?' — '+e.no:''}`;}
07285: function bh5SnapshotVehicle(v){return v?{id:v.id,plate:v.plate||'',type:v.type||'',make:v.make||'',yr:v.yr||'',vin:v.vin||'',eng:v.eng||'',acct:v.acct||'',reg:v.reg||'',regE:v.regE||'',acc:v.acc||'',note:v.note||'',operationalStatus:v.operationalStatus||'',driverId:v.drv||''}:null;}
07286: function bh5SnapshotEmployee(e){return e?{id:e.id,name:e.name||'',role:e.role||'',nid:e.nid||'',no:e.no||'',tel:e.tel||'',lic:e.lic||'',licE:e.licE||''}:null;}
07287: function bh5FuelOptions(selected){return ['غير محدد','فارغ','ربع الخزان','نصف الخزان','ثلاثة أرباع','ممتلئ'].map(x=>`<option ${x===selected?'selected':''}>${x}</option>`).join('');}
07288: function bh5OperationalOptions(selected){return BH4_VEHICLE_STATUSES.filter(x=>!['sold'].includes(x[0])).map(([k,l])=>`<option value="${k}" ${k===selected?'selected':''}>${l}</option>`).join('');}
07289: function bh5DateInRange(d,from,to){const x=String(d||'').slice(0,10);return (!from||x>=from)&&(!to||x<=to);}

04874: function clientPortfolioForEmployee(e, seg){
04875:   const role=opsNormArabic(e?.role||''),requested=seg==='خرسانة'?'concrete':seg==='بلوك'?'block':seg==='all'?'':seg==='auto'?(role.includes('خرسان')?'concrete':role.includes('بلوك')?'block':''):'';
04876:   const deliveries=(typeof OPS!=='undefined'&&OPS?.deliveries||[]).filter(d=>d.status!=='returned'&&d.employeeId===e.id&&(!requested||opsSalesKind(d)===requested)),activity=new Map();
04877:   deliveries.forEach(d=>{if(!d.clientId)return;const a=activity.get(d.clientId)||{kinds:new Set(),lastDate:'',sales:0};const kind=opsSalesKind(d);if(kind)a.kinds.add(kind);a.lastDate=String(d.date||'')>a.lastDate?String(d.date||''):a.lastDate;a.sales+=Number(d.amount||0);activity.set(d.clientId,a);});
04878:   return D.cli.filter(c=>{
04879:     const assigned=c.rep===e.id||(Array.isArray(c.repIds)&&c.repIds.includes(e.id)),active=activity.has(c.id);if(!assigned&&!active)return false;if(!requested)return true;const a=activity.get(c.id);if(a?.kinds.has(requested))return true;return assigned&&(c.seg===(requested==='concrete'?'خرسانة':'بلوك')||c.seg==='الاثنين');
04880:   }).map(c=>{const a=activity.get(c.id),kinds=a?.kinds||new Set(),actualSeg=kinds.size>1?'الاثنين':kinds.has('concrete')?'خرسانة':kinds.has('block')?'بلوك':c.seg;return {...c,_portfolioSegment:actualSeg,_portfolioLastDate:a?.lastDate||'',_portfolioSales:a?.sales||0};}).sort((a,b)=>String(a.name).localeCompare(String(b.name),'ar'));
04881: }
04882: function docCli(e, seg){
04883:   const R = ref();

06590: function opsRenderSafety(){const open=OPS.incidents.filter(x=>x.status==='open'),cost=OPS.incidents.reduce((s,x)=>s+Number(x.cost||0),0);opsEl('opsContent').innerHTML=opsHead('الحوادث والسلامة','بلاغات الحوادث والإصابات والتلف والإجراءات التصحيحية',`<button class="ops-btn primary" onclick="opsIncidentForm()">بلاغ حادث</button>`)+`<div class="ops-kpis">${opsKpi(open.length,'بلاغات مفتوحة',open.length?'danger':'')}${opsKpi(OPS.incidents.length,'إجمالي البلاغات','blue')}${opsKpi(OPS.incidents.filter(x=>x.severity==='حرج').length,'حوادث حرجة','danger')}${opsKpi(OPS.incidents.filter(x=>x.injury==='نعم').length,'بلاغات إصابة','warn')}${opsKpi(opsMoney(cost),'تكلفة مقدرة','purple')}${opsKpi(OPS.incidents.filter(x=>x.status==='closed').length,'بلاغات مغلقة')}</div><div class="ops-card"><h3>سجل الحوادث <span class="n">${OPS.incidents.length}</span></h3>${OPS.incidents.length?`<div class="ops-table-wrap"><table class="ops-table"><thead><tr><th>الرقم</th><th>التاريخ</th><th>النوع</th><th>المكان</th><th>المسؤول</th><th>الوصف</th><th>الشدة</th><th>التكلفة</th><th>الحالة</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>${OPS.incidents.map(i=>`<tr><td class="mono">${opsEsc(i.no)}</td><td>${opsFmtDate(i.date)}</td><td>${opsEsc(i.type)}</td><td>${opsEsc(opsLoc(i.locationId)?.name||i.place||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(opsEmp(i.employeeId)?.name||'—')}</td><td>${opsEsc(i.description)}<div class="muted">${opsEsc(i.action||'')}</div></td><td>${i.severity==='حرج'?'<span class="ops-status bad">حرج</span>':i.severity==='متوسط'?'<span class="ops-status warn">متوسط</span>':opsStatus('active')}</td><td class="num">${opsMoney(i.cost)}</td><td>${opsStatus(i.status)}</td><td>${i.status==='open'?`<button class="ops-btn primary sm" onclick="opsIncidentCloseForm('${i.id}')">إغلاق</button>`:''} ${opsFileBadges(i.attachments)}</td></tr>`).join('')}</tbody></table></div>`:opsEmpty('لا توجد حوادث مسجلة','')}</div>`;}
06591: function opsIncidentForm(){opsOpenModal('تسجيل حادث أو واقعة',`<div class="ops-form-grid"><div><label class="ops-required">التاريخ</label><input type="date" name="date" value="${opsToday()}" —')}</select></div><div><label>الموظف المعني</label><select name="employeeId">${opsSelect(opsEmployees(false),'','— اختر —')}</select></div><div><label>مركبة مرتبطة</label><select — ${i.description}`,module:'incident',moduleId:i.id,attachments:files});await opsPersist('بلاغ حادث '+i.no);},'اعتماد البلاغ');}
06592: function opsIncidentCloseForm(id){const i=opsById(OPS.incidents,id);if(!i)return;opsOpenModal('إغلاق البلاغ',`<div class="ops-form-grid"><div><label class="ops-required">تاريخ الإغلاق</label><input type="date" name="closeDate" value="${opsToday()}" required></div><div><label>التكلفة النهائية</label><input type="number" step="any" name="cost" value="${i.cost||''}"></div><div class="full"><label class="ops-required">الإجراء التصحيحي والنتيجة</label><textarea name="action" required rows="3"></textarea></div><div class="full"><label>مرفقات الإغلاق</label><input type="file" name="files" multiple></div></div>`,async fd=>{const files=await opsSaveFiles(fd.getAll('files'));i.closeDate=opsFd(fd,'closeDate');i.cost=Number(opsFd(fd,'cost')||0);i.action=opsFd(fd,'action');i.status='closed';i.attachments.push(...files);opsAddMovementRecord('INCIDENT_CLOSE',{date:i.closeDate+'T12:00',employeeId:i.employeeId,entityKind:i.vehicleId?'vehicle':'employee',entityId:i.vehicleId||i.employeeId,amount:i.cost,reference:i.no,notes:i.action,module:'incident',moduleId:i.id,attachments:files});await opsPersist('إغلاق حادث '+i.no);},'اعتماد الإغلاق');}
